summary: A local television news report carrying a 'GC' station bug and an on-screen clock. Sampled frames include an interview with a man standing outside a building, captioned with a speaker name and remarks about a community being saddened, and an interview with a bald man in a polo shirt identified by a lower-third as a police chief. The report includes burned-in captions.

script.scene: A man stands outside a building speaking to a reporter; caption attributes remarks about a saddened community to a named speaker.
A bald man in a polo shirt speaks outdoors; a lower-third identifies him as a police chief.
